# use [IMPLEMENTED]

## Status

Implemented — this is a real `hotam` CLI subcommand; running it does something.

## Canon

§Domain

## Purpose

Usage: hotam use <domain-name>. Sets the active-domain preference for the current project: records {"active_domain": "<name>"} in the project-root marker so a bare `hotam <command>` (no --domain) targets the chosen domain. Refuses if <root>/domains/<name>/graph.json does not exist.
